phrases.french: La cathédrale est dans quelle direction ?
phrases.phonetic: lah kah-tay-DRAL eh don kel dee-rec-SYON
phrases.context: The cathedral towers are visible from most of the centre — they serve as a natural landmark for orientation.

phrases.french: Quelle maison de champagne recommandez-vous pour un débutant ?
phrases.english: Which champagne house do you recommend for a first-timer?
phrases.phonetic: kel may-ZON duh shom-PAH-nyuh ruh-koh-mon-DAY voo poor un day-bew-TON
phrases.context: For first-timers, Mumm is accessible and central. Taittinger has the most spectacular historical cellars. Pommery is best for art lovers.

tips: Allow a full day minimum — cathedral, one or two champagne houses, and dinner is a satisfying itinerary
Reims is 45 minutes by TGV from Paris — works well as a day trip but better as an overnight
The Art Deco architecture throughout the centre dates from the city's rapid rebuilding after WWI — look up as you walk
